source_note: Parsed from the labelled synthetic fixtures in tests/fixtures/csv_series/ through collectors/adapters/csv_series.py. Every record carries evidence_class 'synthetic_test_fixture'. These are not published statistics.

records.route_scope: Composite east-west mainlane benchmark, not a Thailand route

known_limitations: Generated by scripts/generate_synthetic_fixtures.py. This value is a synthetic test fixture, not a published statistic, and must not be read as an observation of the real world.
This is a market benchmark for a third route, used only as a directional indicator. It is not a Thailand shipment quotation, not a Thailand average, and not a rate any shipper was charged.
No qualified dataset covering Thailand-origin freight rates exists in this registry, so no Thailand freight average is published anywhere in the platform.
